tst_2024: I am an elderly woman who lives alone in Arizona.  I was divorced 22 years ago and never remarried.  I raised three children in a suburban environment.  I never worked more than part-time when my children were growing up. After I was divorced I went to school and got an Nursing degree in the 50's.  I worked as a Hospice Nurse for fifteen years which was very challenging but also rewarding.  I was diagnosed with lung disease when I was 55 years old and found that I had a genetic mutation for Cystic Fibrosis.  This explained and life long problem with a chronic cough and eventually difficulty breathing.  I am retired now and have a Doodle puppy that keeps me company.  I grew up in Florida and we moved to Massachusetts, and New York.  I worked in various offices as a secretary and eventually worked in medical offices in the front office.  I lived in New Jersey, Texas, Colorado, Minnesota, California, Arizona, Oregon and Washington.  I enjoy change and seeing new places. I have one grandchild who is 9 years old now and I spent a lot of time with him up until and year ago when I moved to Arizona.  My adult children live in three different states but I see them as much as possible.  I like to do craft projects and enjoy gardening. I like to read all kinds of books and always have since I was a child. I have a sister and a brother who live in Florida who I don't see very much.  My sister and I stay in contact through emails and phone calls.   I have 2 nieces and 1 nephew who live on the East Coast and don't see very much anymore.  My father was in the Navy during WWII but didn't see active service before the War ended.  My mother died when I was 23 years old and my father died when I was 30 years old.  I have a lot of cousins living in New England but haven't seen them since I was a teenager.  I like to walk with my dog and enjoy nature.  I really like Arizona because it is so diverse with climate, terrain, altitudes, and things to do with deserts and mountains. I am a Democrat and hope that our country to find peace whether it's together or living separately according to what people believe.  I wish for world peace. I love animals and have had many different pets in my life.  I would love to have a little farm with lots of animals but I'm afraid it would be too much work for me now.

I am an empath...no I mean a true empath.  I can stand beside a complete stranger and know what emotions they are experiencing.  This is especially trying in crowds; like the grocery store, or super market.  I wear a veil; a head covering to filter what I pick up.  It gets confusing because the people I am closest to sometimes gets overwhelmingly emotional and I have a difficult time distinguishing their emotions from my own.  So humorously at times I am mad and do not know why, or unfortunately sad and not know why.  I am also an INTJ which means that I have difficulty with my own emotions but the universe has jokes.
All and all I am a happy, blessed woman.
